TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pslkotas, title = pslkotas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pslkotas} }

S.FORM: pslkotas babaw kmnloh 'bagan lga, pslkotas qu qalang Tayal la. msli kuwara qu qutux niqan, qmasuw pcyuwagun, psqqas grhuw ryax. tehuk ryax lga, msqun tegalu ki mlawa Utux Wagiq ru utux bnkis, msqun mquwas ru mzyugi smqqas ki mplaw maniq. pslkotas hya ga psqutux inlungan qalang ki 'mubuy psglabang gaga Tayal.

pslkotas babaw kmnloh 'bagan lga, pslkotas qu qalang Tayal la. msli kuwara qu qutux niqan, qmasuw pcyuwagun, psqqas grhuw ryax. tehuk ryax lga, msqun tegalu ki mlawa Utux Wagiq ru utux bnkis, msqun mquwas ru mzyugi smqqas ki mplaw maniq. pslkotas hya ga psqutux inlungan qalang ki 'mubuy psglabang gaga Tayal.
S.PHON: ps~ɕlkotas~ɕ βaβaw kmnloħ ʔβaɣan lɣa, ps~ɕlkotas~ɕ qu qalaŋ tajal la. ms~ɕli kuwara qu qutux niqan, qmas~ɕuw pʦ~ʨjuwaɣun, ps~ɕqqas~ɕ ɣrħuw rjax. teħuk rjax lɣa, ms~ɕqun teɣalu ki mlawa utux waɣiq ru utux βnkis~ɕ, ms~ɕqun mquwas~ɕ ru mzjuɣi s~ɕmqqas~ɕ ki mplaw maniq. ps~ɕlkotas~ɕ ħja ɣa ps~ɕqutux inluŋan qalaŋ ki ʔmuβuj ps~ɕɣlaβaŋ ɣaɣa tajal.
